---
title: "06. Data Visualisation"
---

# Data Visualisation {#sec-ch-06-visualisation}

The `ggplot2` grammar, panelled and faceted layouts, statistical graphics for regression and survival, and visual diagnostics. Style choices are biased toward what reproduces in print and what survives a black-and-white photocopy.

This chapter contains **35 method pages** and **1 lab**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.Rmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Aesthetics and Geoms](aesthetics-and-geoms.Rmd) | `aesthetics-and-geoms` |
| [Annotations and Labels](annotations-and-labels.Rmd) | `annotations-and-labels` |
| [Bar Charts](bar-charts.Rmd) | `bar-charts` |
| [Bland-Altman Plots](bland-altman-plots.Rmd) | `bland-altman-plots` |
| [Boxplots](boxplots.Rmd) | `boxplots` |
| [Bubble Plots](bubble-plots.Rmd) | `bubble-plots` |
| [Colour Palettes](colour-palettes.Rmd) | `colour-palettes` |
| [Colour-Blind-Safe Plots](colour-blind-safe-plots.Rmd) | `colour-blind-safe-plots` |
| [Contour Plots](contour-plots.Rmd) | `contour-plots` |
| [Correlation Heatmaps](correlation-heatmaps.Rmd) | `correlation-heatmaps` |
| [Density Plots](density-plots.Rmd) | `density-plots` |
| [Dot Plots](dot-plots.Rmd) | `dot-plots` |
| [Facets and Panels](facets-and-panels.Rmd) | `facets-and-panels` |
| [Forest Plots (Visualisation)](forest-plots-viz.Rmd) | `forest-plots-viz` |
| [Funnel Plots (Visualisation)](funnel-plots-viz.Rmd) | `funnel-plots-viz` |
| [ggplot2 Themes](ggplot-themes.Rmd) | `ggplot-themes` |
| [Heatmaps](heatmaps.Rmd) | `heatmaps` |
| [Hexbin Plots](hexbin-plots.Rmd) | `hexbin-plots` |
| [Histograms](histograms.Rmd) | `histograms` |
| [Interactive Plots with ggiraph](interactive-ggiraph.Rmd) | `interactive-ggiraph` |
| [Interactive Plots with plotly](interactive-plotly.Rmd) | `interactive-plotly` |
| [Line Plots](line-plots.Rmd) | `line-plots` |
| [Pairs Plots](pairs-plots.Rmd) | `pairs-plots` |
| [Patchwork: Multi-Plot Composition](patchwork-composition.Rmd) | `patchwork-composition` |
| [Raincloud Plots](raincloud-plots.Rmd) | `raincloud-plots` |
| [Ridge Plots](ridge-plots.Rmd) | `ridge-plots` |
| [ROC Curves](roc-curves-plot.Rmd) | `roc-curves-plot` |
| [Saving and Exporting Figures](ggsave-and-export.Rmd) | `ggsave-and-export` |
| [Scales and Coordinates](scales-and-coordinates.Rmd) | `scales-and-coordinates` |
| [Scatter Plots](scatter-plots.Rmd) | `scatter-plots` |
| [Stacked and Dodged Bars](stacked-dodged-bars.Rmd) | `stacked-dodged-bars` |
| [Survival Curves](survival-curves-plot.Rmd) | `survival-curves-plot` |
| [The Grammar of Graphics](grammar-of-graphics.Rmd) | `grammar-of-graphics` |
| [Time Series Plots](time-series-plots.Rmd) | `time-series-plots` |
| [Violin Plots](violin-plots.Rmd) | `violin-plots` |

## Labs

| Lab |
|---|
| [ggplot2 grammar and multi-panel layouts](labs/lab-ggplot2-grammar-and-multi-panel-layouts.Rmd) |
